title: DRB Modpack
description:
The Official DRB Modpack. This modpack keeps the Vanilla feel with several additional performance enhancing mods. There are also some ease of life mods that create a smoother experience overall. 

If you want that Vanilla+ feel, this is the pack for you.
body:
The official modpack of the DRB server.

This modpack is a lightweight Vanilla-Style pack with a focus on keeping the normal Minecraft experience, with an optimized and improved game experience. It includes several mods that increase clinet side performance, as well as some ease of life changes that make playing the game more smooth overall. The most gamechanging mod in the pack is the PMMO mod (Project MMO) which may be replaced or removed at a later date based off feedback. 

Happy mining!!!
